_publications._publicationTitle: MEK Inhibitors Lead to PDGFR Pathway Upregulation and Sensitize Tumors to RAF Dimer Inhibitors in NF1-Deficient Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor.

_contextSnippet: there was an increase in the RAS-GTP and pMEK levels in a dose- and time-dependent manner
details: Detected dose- and time-dependent increase in RAS-GTP levels upon MEK inhibitor treatment
